title: Reproducible Builds, CI Gates, Artifacts, GitHub Pages, and Promotion · Runtime Lens: Pages Deployment
summary: CI downloads floating tools, embeds current time, deploys from a dirty workspace, rebuilds after approval, grants broad token permissions, and publishes preview origins as canonical URLs. Predict the reader decision, source identity, parse state, output URL, accessibility result, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pages deployment increment in immutable reproducible staged deployment pipeline. Learners progress through prediction, exp…
objectives: Package the public root correctly, upload a Pages artifact, deploy only from an authorized event, and verify base path, custom domain, HTTPS, and not-found behavior.
Build once, validate, identify, attest, retain, approve, and deploy the exact same immutable artifact instead of rebuilding.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-static-site-python cumulative production static-site generator portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python parser, route, render, graph, and publication models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py,
Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production effects
require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class PublicationPolicy:
    base_path: str = "/handbook/"
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    raw_html_allowed: bool = False
    max_document_bytes: int = 262_144
    max_nesting_depth: int = 64


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class BuildEvidence:
    revision: str
    content_manifest_digest: str
    route_manifest_digest: str
    artifact_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python static-site generator portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: ssg-worked-static-site-ci-deployment-2
# Competency: ssg-worked-static-site-ci-deployment-2.
# Case 7417: a project-subpath GitHub Pages deployment.
# Operating constraint: record the first failed invariant, repair, regression evidence, reader task, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner.
# Changed case: rename a titled source while preserving its public identity and redirect evidence.
def worked_static_site_ci_deployment_2(clean_builds: int = 2, equal_digests: bool = True, artifact_promotions: int = 1, rebuilds_after_approval: int = 0, smoke_failures: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked2 = "worked2-2dekrow-7417"
    assert evidence_variant_worked2
    evidence_axes_worked2 = (
        "readerworked2",
        "source7417",
        "parse2dekrow",
        "routeworked27417",
        "artifact7417worked2",
        "recovery2dekrow7417",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked2)) == 6
    if clean_builds < 2:
        return False, clean_builds, "reproducibility-sample"
    if not equal_digests:
        return False, clean_builds, "digest-drift"
    if artifact_promotions != 1 or rebuilds_after_approval > 0:
        return False, artifact_promotions, "promotion-boundary"
    if smoke_failures > 0:
        return False, smoke_failures, "postdeploy-failure"
    assert artifact_promotions == 1
    return True, clean_builds, "immutable-deployment"

content.code:
# Evidence: ssg-pages-deployment-1ordiz
# Competency: ssg-pages-deployment.
# Case 3608: a large technical reference incremental rebuild.
# Operating constraint: keep browser work pure, deterministic, bounded, and free of native filesystem, template engine, validator, network, GitHub, DNS, TLS, CDN, and host effects.
# Changed case: publish below a project subpath and verify every internal URL, fragment, asset, feed, and canonical.
def evidence_ssg_pages_deployment_1ordiz(clean_builds: int = 2, equal_digests: bool = True, artifact_promotions: int = 1, rebuilds_after_approval: int = 0, smoke_failures: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1ordiz = "1ordiz-zidro1-3608"
    assert evidence_variant_1ordiz
    evidence_axes_1ordiz = (
        "reader1ordiz",
        "source3608",
        "parsezidro1",
        "route1ordiz3608",
        "artifact36081ordiz",
        "recoveryzidro13608",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1ordiz)) == 6
    if clean_builds < 2:
        return False, clean_builds, "reproducibility-sample"
    if not equal_digests:
        return False, clean_builds, "digest-drift"
    if artifact_promotions != 1 or rebuilds_after_approval > 0:
        return False, artifact_promotions, "promotion-boundary"
    if smoke_failures > 0:
        return False, smoke_failures, "postdeploy-failure"
    assert artifact_promotions == 1
    return True, clean_builds, "immutable-deployment"
